examples: This fine tirade sounded, however, to the ungodly sailor-boy like a mere Pippi-pi.
God hath delivered me to the ungodly, and turned me over into the hands of the wicked.
The answer, of course, is that they work in an industry that's become ungodly profitable.
Junk, I rallied already 40 basis points this year. 567 or some ungodly number like that.
You're paying ungodly amounts for insurance, and it's not like the insurance I had when I was working.
